scripts.check: bun run check:toolchain && bun run check:biome && bun run check:rustfmt && bun run check:code-quality && bun run check:workspace-layout && bun run check:test-layout && bun run check:assets && bun run check:vscode-adapter && bun run check:package-parity && bun run check:vsix-freshness && bun run check:data-objects && bun run check:entrypoints && bun run check:source-lines && bun run check:rust-test-layout && bun run check:rust-production-constraints && bun run check:typescript-style && bun run check:napi-boundary && bun run check:clippy && bun run typecheck && bun run check:extension-build && cargo test --workspace && bun run test:extension && bun run test:napi
scripts.package: bun run vscode:prepublish && cd packages/vscode-extension && bunx vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.test: bun run test:extension && bun run test:napi
scripts.test:napi: bun run native:build && bun test tests/napi
scripts.vscode:prepublish: bun run native:build:release && bun run build
